title: Pope Leo, After Taking on Trump and A.I., Prepares for New Duels in Spain
summary_full: Leo arrived in Spain on Saturday for a weeklong visit in which he will meet with migrants and may come under fire from Vox, Spain’s far-right party.
summary_public: Leo arrived in Spain on Saturday for a weeklong visit in which he will meet with migrants and may come under fire from Vox, Spain’s far-right party.
